reference: Dear parent, this could be due to a Helicobacter pylori infection. Helicobacter pylori infection could be the reason for the inflamed stomach. She should take a breath test to confirm the diagnosis of Helicobacter pylori infection and then start treatment accordingly.
text: Dear parent, this could be due to a Helicobacter pylori infection. Helicobacter pylori infection could be the reason for the inflamed stomach. She should take a breath test to confirm the diagnosis of Helicobacter pylori infection and then start treatment accordingly.
